service.description: buh node PQ-mTLS ingress (BUH_NODE_PORT). This is the single port a node exposes: the relay/blob API served over X25519MLKEM768 mutual TLS, with peers pinned per-CA. The plain loopback health port (127.0.0.1:8080) is never opened. Forward this port from the edge (OPNsense/router) to the node host.
